---
title: "The Field of NLP Is Chasing the Wrong Goal"
description: "Jesse Dunietz on examining a system's comprehension via four dimensions: spatial, temporal, causal, and motivational."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-08-01"
categories: [NLP, NLU, research, evaluation, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![The field of NLP is chasing the wrong goal. Image from [MIT Technology Review](https://www.technologyreview.com/2020/07/31/1005876/natural-language-processing-evaluation-ai-opinion/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

A thoughtful article from Jesse Dunietz: how can we pull up from the narrow focus of SOTA-oriented NLP research, to examine a system's comprehension more holistically via these four dimensions proposed by David Ferrucci: Spatial, Temporal, Causal and Motivational.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-field-of-natural-language-processing-activity-6695431179362975744-HNai).*
